topbar.methodology_label: Methodology — how every score, bucket, and projection is computed

auth.role_unsupported: Your account is not configured for this console.

ctx.placeholder_body: Detail content lands in subsequent phases. The chrome scaffold is in place per the approved migration plan.

deferred.projections_r4: Projections + fan chart land in Phase R4.
deferred.history_r6: History snapshots arrive in Phase R6.

household.select_first: Select a client from the topbar to view their household.
household.missing_client: Client not found or you don't have access.

account.missing_account: Account not found in this household.
account.no_goals_in_account: This account has no goal allocations yet.

goal.missing_goal: Goal not found in this household.
goal.advanced_panels_pending: Allocation, projections, optimizer output, and rebalance moves arrive in Phase R4.

review.placeholder_description: Doc-drop and conflict resolution surface ships in Phase R7.

cma.placeholder_description: Analyst CMA tooling ships in Phase R9.

methodology.placeholder_description: Ten-section methodology overlay ships in Phase R8.

risk_slider.title: Goal risk
risk_slider.override_active_banner: Override active · Document rationale before saving
risk_slider.rationale_placeholder: Why are you overriding the system score? Capture context for the audit trail.
risk_slider.toast_saved: Override saved with rationale captured in audit log.
risk_slider.locked_tooltip: Your role cannot edit goal risk. Phase B will add Request access flow.
risk_slider.locked_description: Override capture requires the advisor:risk:write permission.
risk_slider.history_empty: No overrides on file. System score is in effect.

fan_chart.title: Projected outcome
fan_chart.no_data: No projection available — start value or horizon missing.
fan_chart.probability_callout: {{pct}}% chance of reaching target by year {{year}}

goal_allocation.no_holdings: No holdings on file for this goal.

moves.no_moves: No rebalance moves required — current matches ideal within rounding.

banner.bold: Most households are onboarded by uploading documents and conversation notes.
banner.body: The AI extraction handles the data entry. Use this form for edge cases, or when you have all the data ready to enter manually.

recovery.title: Resume in-progress household setup?
recovery.body: An unsaved wizard draft was found in this browser session.

commit.success_body: The household tree was created and an audit event was recorded.

step1.title: Who is the household?
step1.subtitle: Basic identification. Risk profile and goals come next.
step1.consent_label: Both members consent to a joint household view.
step1.consent_help: Joint households can share fees and reporting. Both members must sign a consent form before account opening.
step1.notes_placeholder: Anything an advisor should know — life events, preferences, prior history…

step2.title: Household risk profile
step2.subtitle: Four questions establish tolerance (T) and capacity (C). The household anchor is min(T, C) ÷ 2.
step2.q1_text: How do you see yourself: are you generally a person who is fully prepared to take risks, or do you try to avoid taking risks?
step2.q1_legend: 0 = avoid risk · 10 = fully prepared to take risks
step2.q2_text: When something unexpected and stressful happens, how do you typically respond?
step2.q3_text: Which of these are likely sources of stress for the household over the next 5 years? Select all that apply.
step2.q4_text: What is the household's capacity to take on investment risk?

step3.title: Accounts and goals
step3.subtitle: Add the household's accounts, then assign each goal's funding across them.

step4.title: External holdings (optional)
step4.subtitle: Funds held outside Steadyhand. Asset percentages must sum to 100.
step4.empty: No external holdings on file. Click Add holding or skip.

step5.title: Review and commit
step5.subtitle: Confirm the household tree before committing. Audit event fires on success.

empty.no_clients: No clients yet. Onboard a household via doc-drop or the wizard.
empty.no_goals: This household has no goals yet.
empty.no_portfolio_run: No portfolio generated yet for this household.
empty.no_holdings: No holdings on file for this account.
empty.no_snapshots: No history yet for this household.
empty.backend_unavailable: Backend unavailable. Retry once the API is reachable.

errors.boundary_scoped: Error in {{scope}}. The rest of the console is still available.
errors.report_phase_b: Reporting channel coming in Phase B.

scaffold.title: v36 rewrite scaffold ready
scaffold.description: Engine modules + design tokens + i18n + a11y + telemetry are wired. The advisor console (TopBar / Stage / Context Panel / three-view) lands in subsequent phases per the approved migration plan.

realign.title: Goal realignment
realign.intro: Re-goaling re-labels dollars between goals. Underlying holdings don't move and no money changes accounts. The blended risk score for each account may shift; the audit trail captures every change.
realign.no_goals_for_account: No goals are linked to this account yet.
realign.legs_balanced: All accounts balanced. Apply to record before/after snapshots.
realign.legs_imbalanced: Each account's leg sums must equal its current value before Apply.
realign.confirm_body: After-state preserved. History tab shows both snapshots.
realign.revert_body: Before-state restored as a new history snapshot.

compare.intro: Side-by-side compare of two household snapshots. Δ shows the change relative to the before column.
compare.no_goals: No goals captured in this snapshot.

history.restore_success_body: A new history row was added for the restore action.
